title: Application crash on screen rotation
symptom: When rotating the device while a playback is active, the application closes unexpectedly with a NullPointerException.
root_cause: The media controller reference was being released in onPause but accessed in the layout orientation change handler before being recreated.
resolution: Check for nullity of the media controller before accessing it in the layout change listener, or defer layout adjustment until onResume.

title: Network timeout during large file upload
symptom: Uploads of files larger than 100MB consistently fail with a 'Socket Timeout' error after exactly 30 seconds.
root_cause: The default connection timeout in the OkHttp client was set to 30s, which is insufficient for large uploads on slower networks.
resolution: Increase writeTimeout and connectTimeout to 120s for the upload service client.

title: Memory leak in transaction history list
symptom: The app becomes sluggish and eventually crashes after browsing transaction history for several minutes.
root_cause: Each list item was holding a strong reference to the parent Activity context through an image loading callback that never cleared.
resolution: Use WeakReference for the context in the callback and explicitly clear the callback in the ViewHolder's recycled state.

title: Duplicate database entries on quick retry
symptom: If the user taps the 'Submit' button twice in rapid succession, two identical records are created in the database.
root_cause: Missing debouncing logic on the UI button and lack of a unique constraint on the transaction_id column.
resolution: Disable the button immediately after the first click and add a UNIQUE constraint to the transaction_id column in the SQL schema.

title: Low frame rate in animation on low-end devices
symptom: Transition animations between pages stutter noticeably on devices with less than 4GB RAM.
root_cause: Unoptimized high-resolution PNG assets were being scaled in real-time on the main thread during the animation.
resolution: Replace large PNGs with VectorDrawables or webp format, and use hardware acceleration for the transition layer.

title: Crash .NET BGC SmartThingsApp
root_cause: memory address was changed by memory compaction by .NET BGC. but native callback was called with old address
resolution: fix the issued memory address with GCHandle
